description: Style Noteboss in Motion comes in a futuristically styled metal sphere container for hugo boss' boss in Motion. This versatile fragrance is perfect for cold winter nights and summer days, with excellent longevity. Product DetailsThe top notes are citrusy green accords and the base is pepper, cinnamon and cardamom. The base is woody and has notes of muskCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize90 ml
